evals.prompt: Deploy our NestJS API to AWS ECS Fargate. We have a Dockerfile, need a task definition, ECS service, ALB with health checks, and CloudWatch logging. The app connects to RDS PostgreSQL and Redis ElastiCache.
evals.expected_output: ECS task definition, service config, ALB setup, CloudWatch logs, security groups for RDS/Redis access

assertions.name: task_definition
assertions.description: ECS task definition with container, port mapping, env vars, and log config

assertions.name: alb_health_check
assertions.description: ALB configured with health check path and interval

assertions.name: security_groups
assertions.description: Security groups allowing ECS to reach RDS and Redis

assertions.name: cloudwatch_logs
assertions.description: Log driver configured to send to CloudWatch

assertions.name: secrets_via_ssm
assertions.description: Secrets injected via SSM Parameter Store or Secrets Manager, not hardcoded

evals.prompt: Set up a CI/CD pipeline to deploy our React app to S3 + CloudFront. Build with npm, upload to S3, invalidate CloudFront cache. Use GitHub Actions. Include staging and production environments.
evals.expected_output: GitHub Actions workflow with build, S3 sync, CloudFront invalidation, and environment promotion

assertions.name: github_actions_workflow
assertions.description: Complete workflow YAML with build and deploy jobs

assertions.name: s3_sync
assertions.description: aws s3 sync command to upload build artifacts

assertions.name: cloudfront_invalidation
assertions.description: CloudFront cache invalidation after deploy

assertions.name: two_environments
assertions.description: Staging and production deployment targets

assertions.name: env_promotion
assertions.description: Manual approval or gate between staging and production

evals.prompt: Deploy a Python Django API to AWS Lambda using Zappa or Mangum. The app uses PostgreSQL on RDS and S3 for file storage. Need API Gateway configuration and VPC setup for RDS access.
evals.expected_output: Lambda deployment config, API Gateway setup, VPC configuration for RDS, S3 permissions

assertions.name: lambda_handler
assertions.description: Django configured with Mangum or Zappa handler for Lambda

assertions.name: api_gateway
assertions.description: API Gateway configured to route requests to Lambda

assertions.name: vpc_config
assertions.description: Lambda in VPC with subnets that can reach RDS

assertions.name: s3_permissions
assertions.description: IAM role with S3 read/write permissions

assertions.name: env_vars
assertions.description: Environment variables for DATABASE_URL and secrets

evals.prompt: Set up infrastructure for our microservices on AWS using Terraform. We have 3 NestJS services, each needs its own ECS service, shared ALB with path-based routing, shared RDS cluster, and shared Redis. Include auto-scaling.
evals.expected_output: Terraform modules for ECS cluster, per-service task definitions, ALB routing rules, RDS, Redis, and auto-scaling policies

assertions.name: terraform_modules
assertions.description: Terraform code with modules for ECS, RDS, Redis, ALB

assertions.name: path_based_routing
assertions.description: ALB routes /api/users to user-service, /api/orders to order-service, etc.

assertions.name: shared_infrastructure
assertions.description: RDS and Redis shared across services

assertions.name: auto_scaling
assertions.description: ECS auto-scaling policies based on CPU/memory

assertions.name: per_service_config
assertions.description: Each service has its own task definition and environment vars

evals.prompt: Plan a blue-green deployment strategy for our NestJS API on ECS. We need zero-downtime deploys, automatic rollback on health check failure, and the ability to manually switch traffic back to the old version.
evals.expected_output: Blue-green deployment config with CodeDeploy, health checks, automatic rollback, and manual traffic shifting

assertions.name: blue_green_setup
assertions.description: Two target groups (blue/green) with traffic shifting

assertions.name: health_checks
assertions.description: Health check configuration for deployment validation

assertions.name: auto_rollback
assertions.description: Automatic rollback on health check failure

assertions.name: manual_switch
assertions.description: Ability to manually redirect traffic to previous version

assertions.name: zero_downtime
assertions.description: Traffic shifts gradually, no connection drops
